/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libspeed_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/speed_control_msgs/libspeed_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/speed_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/speed_control_msgs/srv/_adjust_speed_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/ros2_wsorincp/build/speed_control_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libspeed_control_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libspeed_control_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
